## Plan Summary

Here's what I found and how the implementation will work — **only `src/pipelines.js` needs to be modified**, in 4 places:

---

### What already exists (no changes needed elsewhere)
- `AutoModelForImageTextToText` is fully defined in `src/models.js` (maps to Florence-2, Llava, SmolVLM, PaliGemma, Qwen2-VL, and 6 more)
- `TextImagePipelineConstructorArgs` typedef (supports both tokenizer + processor) already exists in `src/pipelines.js`
- `prepareImages()` utility already exists and is used by other image pipelines

---

### The 4 edits to `src/pipelines.js`

| # | Location | Change |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Line ~41, inside `import from './models.js'` | Add `AutoModelForImageTextToText,` after `AutoModelForDocumentQuestionAnswering` |
| 2 | After line 2005, after `ImageToTextPipeline` | Insert JSDoc typedefs + `export class ImageTextToTextPipeline` |
| 3 | After line 3255, after `"image-to-text"` in `SUPPORTED_TASKS` | Insert full `"image-text-to-text": { ... }` entry |
| 4 | Line ~3427, inside `pipeline()` JSDoc bullet list | Add `"image-text-to-text"` bullet after `"image-to-text"` |

---

### The `_call` logic

```js
async _call(image, text, generate_kwargs = {}) {
    const preparedImage = (await prepareImages(image))[0];       // single image
    const { pixel_values } = await this.processor(preparedImage); // image → pixels
    const { input_ids } = this.tokenizer(text, { padding: true, truncation: true }); // text → tokens
    const output = await this.model.generate({ inputs: input_ids, pixel_values, ...generate_kwargs });
    return this.tokenizer.batch_decode(output, { skip_special_tokens: true })
                         .map(x => ({ generated_text: x.trim() }));
}
```

**Default model:** `"onnx-community/Florence-2-base-ft"` | **Type:** `"multimodal"`

details.command: node -e "const p = require('./src/pipelines.js'); if (typeof p.ImageTextToTextPipeline !== 'function') { process.exit(1); } console.log('OK')"
